admin.name: Platform Administrator
admin.description: The administrative central hub where you manage members, coaches, earnings, and platform-wide configurations.

features.title: Member Management
features.description: View, filter, and modify student records. Handle membership approvals and track their PT session balances.
steps: 1. Navigate to 'Members' in the sidebar.
2. Approve new membership requests to grant system access.
3. Search for existing members using their 4-digit ID or name.
4. Manually update PT session balances if needed.

features.title: Coach & PT Scheduling
features.description: Manage professional coaches and their service offerings. Set up session types, counts, and pricing packages.
steps: 1. Open 'PT Sessions' or 'Coaches' tab.
2. Define new package offerings (e.g., 12 sessions of PT).
3. Assign memberships to various students.
4. Review and approve session bookings from the coach queue.

features.title: Analytical Insights
features.description: Visual data summaries on platform performance, membership growth, and financial earnings.
steps: 1. Check 'Dashboard' for real-time KPIs.
2. Export monthly reports of earnings and session volume.
3. Identify peak hours and active training cohorts.

features.title: Inzan KDS Control
features.description: Monitor and manage Kitchen orders if integrated.
steps: 1. Access 'KDS' to view the digital order queue.
2. Update order statuses (e.g., In Progress to Ready).

features.title: Admin Dashboard
features.description: The command center for Inzan Athletics. Monitor real-time KPIs and system status.
steps: 1. Log in with admin credentials.
2. View active memberships and pending approvals.
3. Monitor revenue and session volume charts.

coach.name: Professional Coach
coach.description: Dedicated portal to manage your training schedule, client list, and earnings.

features.title: Schedule Management
features.description: Set your weekly availability and dates where you're unavailable.
steps: 1. Open the 'Coach App'.
2. Use the 'Calendar' view to set operating hours.
3. Mark specific days off to prevent bookings.

features.title: Session Fulfillment
features.description: Keep track of upcoming sessions and mark them as completed.
steps: 1. View 'Active Sessions' in your dashboard.
2. Mark sessions as 'Complete' after the training ends.
3. If a student misses, mark appropriate 'No-Show' status.

features.title: Earnings & Performance
features.description: Monitor your active sessions and total commissions.
steps: 1. Check the 'Earnings' widget for monthly summaries.
2. View historical session logs for billing accuracy.

features.title: Coach Dashboard
features.description: Manage your daily training schedule and mark session attendance.
steps: 1. Launch Coach App.
2. View your upcoming meetings for the day.
3. Mark sessions as complete to update student balance.

nutritionist.name: Expert Nutritionist
nutritionist.description: Client-centric portal for meal planning, nutritional assessments, and tracking progress.

features.title: Client Assessments
features.description: Record and track client metabolic indicators, goals, and allergies.
steps: 1. Open 'Nutritionist Portal'.
2. Conduct 'Initial Assessment' for a new student.
3. Update measurements (weight, fat percentage, etc.) over time.

features.title: Meal Planning & Assignment
features.description: Create personalized plans and assign them to students in their app.
steps: 1. Use the 'Meal Plan Library' to build templates.
2. Assign a specific plan to a student based on their caloric goal.
3. Client receives the plan directly on their 'User Portal'.

client.name: Student / Client
client.description: The primary interface for personal training, nutrition, and club invitations.

features.title: Session Booking
features.description: Schedule PT sessions or classes based on your active packages.
steps: 1. Open the 'User App'.
2. Choose 'Book Session' or 'Trial Training'.
3. Select a coach, date, and available time slot.
4. Confirmation is instantly sent via push/email.

features.title: Invitation System
features.description: Access your 14 annual invitations to bring guests to the club.
steps: 1. Open 'Invitations' in your sub-page.
2. Enter guest details and desired date.
3. Invitation is generated and access is granted for the guest.

features.title: Meal Plan Access
features.description: View active meal plans assigned by your nutritionist.
steps: 1. Go to the 'Nutrition' tab.
2. View your current meal plan, macro targets, and timing.

kitchen.name: Kitchen Display System (KDS)
kitchen.description: Operational order screen for food and beverage fulfillment.

features.title: Live Order Queue
features.description: Monitor real-time orders from the front desk or students.
steps: 1. Access the 'KDS App'.
2. View incoming tickets with student name and items.
3. Mark 'Ready' when the order is fulfilled.

features.title: Kitchen Display System (KDS)
features.description: The real-time order management interface for Inzan Athletics kitchen staff.
steps: 1. Monitor incoming food and drink orders.
2. Mark orders as 'Ready' to notify students.
3. Track order history for the current shift.
